headline: High eosinophil + prior hospitalizations (n=87) responded at 78% vs a baseline of 42%, suggesting a candidate enrichment subgroup worth prospective evaluation.

manager_check.notes: Automated review only. Statistician sign-off required before clinical decisions.

plan: Profile the CSV (n rows, column types, missingness).
Fit a baseline response model (logistic regression on treatment + key covariates).
Build Kaplan-Meier survival curves split by treatment arm and key subgroups.
